zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Jordan於1617年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可丹納姆時，她的父親Stephen Jordan28歲，母親Mrs Steven Jordan29歲。她於1635年8月20日與Robert Cross I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1677年10月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年60歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Jordan于1617年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可丹納姆时，她的父亲Stephen Jordan28岁，母亲Mrs Steven Jordan29岁。她于1635年8月20日与Robert Cross I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1677年10月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年60岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, French (mainly Alsace and Haute-Savoie), Polish, Czech, and Slovenian; Spanish and Hungarian (Jordán): from the Christian personal name or nickname Jordan. This is taken from the name of the river Jordan (Hebrew Yarden, a derivative of yarad ‘to go down’, i.e. to the Dead Sea). At the time of the Crusades it was a common practice for crusaders and pilgrims to bring back flasks of water from the river in which John the Baptist had baptized people, including Christ himself, and to use it in the christening of their own children. As a result Jordan became quite a common personal name.

variants.name: Giordano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Antonio, Pasquale, Carmine, Vito, Domenic, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Giordano, an equivalent of Jordan .

variants.name: Jourdan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Gabrielle, Henri, Lucien, Pierre, Raoul, Yves.
English: variant of   Jordan  .
French (mainly southern): variant of   Jourdain  , a cognate of 2 below.

variants.name: Jourdain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Pierre, Fritz, Hans, Jacques, Rommel.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique and Dominican Republic): from the French personal name Jourdain, an equivalent of Jordan .
English (London, Derbyshire): French-influenced variant of   Jordan  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Jordison
meanings: English (North Yorkshire, Durham, and Northumberland): from a Middle English pet form, Jordi, of the male personal name Jordan + -son, or directly from a phonetic shortening of Jordanson.

variants.name: Jorden
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .
North German (mainly Jörden): probably a variant of Jordan . Compare Yerden and Yerdon .

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .
German: variant of   Jude  .

variants.name: Jorda
meanings: Catalan (Jordà): from the personal name Jordà (see Jordan ).

variants.name: Jerden
meanings: English: from a variant of the personal name Jurdon, an old form of Jordan .

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

variants.name: Jordon
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Jordan was born in 1617, in Denham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen Jordan, was 28 and her mother, Mrs Steven Jordan, was 29. She married Robert Cross I on 20 August 1635, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 29 October 1677, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60, and was buried in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Jordan est née en 1617, à Denham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Jordan, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs Steven Jordan, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Cross I le 20 août 1635, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1677, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Jordan è nata il nel 1617 nel Denham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Stephen Jordan, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs Steven Jordan, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert Cross I il 20 agosto 1635, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1677, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Jordanが1617年にイギリスイギリススフォルクデンハムで生まれた時，父Stephen Jordanは28歳，母Mrs Steven Jordanは29歳であった。1635年8月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでRobert Cross Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1677年10月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで60歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Jordan(이)가 1617년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Jordan(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Steven Jordan(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1635년 8월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 Robert Cross I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1677년 10월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Jordan nasceu em 1617, em Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Jordan, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Steven Jordan, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cross I em 20 de agosto de 1635, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1677, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Jordan родилась в 1617 г. в местности денам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen Jordan было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Steven Jordan, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cross I 20 августа 1635 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 29 октября 1677 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности ипсвич, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Jordan nació en 1617, en Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen Jordan, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs Steven Jordan, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert Cross I el 20 de agosto de 1635, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1677, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Ipswich, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
